text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Flower, about your homework. You<n>made a few
tiny but noticeable<n>mistakes.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
I know it's tough since you skipped<n>grades, but
let's do our best together,<n>okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! I'll do better next time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been doing well in my<n>studies or races
lately. I've really<n>gotta improve...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I made it all the way to Tracen<n>Academy, so I
have to live up to its<n>standards...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (...How can I become more like a<n>grown-up?)
Guess who!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Eek?! I-I know that voice... Sky?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... don't you have joint training<n>this period?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Meh, figured I'd skip out. I'm in the<n>mood to go
fishing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And it's no fun to go alone. Sooo, if<n>you're free,
wanna come with?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What? Right now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahh, nothing beats fishing in the<n>mountains! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... We haven't caught anything at<n>all yet. Is
that okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If we want to land a big catch,<n>wouldn't it be
better to change<n>locations? Or maybe the bait?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's the hurry? Waiting for a bite<n>is part of the
fun.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Worry too much about results and<n>you'll just
exhaust yourself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I prefer doing things at my own pace.<n>I wanna
enjoy myself, after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sky...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Her own pace... Maybe I can try that<n>too...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! I-I think I've got a bite!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okey-doke, now stay calm. Once I<n>give the sign,
pull on the rod!<n>Aaand—pull!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I caught it... Hehe. It's so tiny and<n>cute. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
See? It doesn't need to be a big catch<n>for you to
have fun, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Right!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In light of Nishino Flower's recent<n>improvement
in both her studies and<n>races, I ask her about the
source of<n>her success.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So... I'm only repeating what<n>someone else said,
but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The key is to take things at your own<n>pace, and
to enjoy what you do! ♪
